changeSet.author: Eugene A. Kalosha
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO permissions (name, permission_group, title, item_order) VALUES ('quantification_metric_export', 'Risk Model Exposure Metric', 'Export CSV', 130) , ('quantification_metric_import', 'Risk Model Exposure Metric', 'Import from CSV', 131) ON CONFLICT (id) DO UPDATE SET permission_group = excluded.permission_group, title = excluded.title, item_order = excluded.item_order;

rollback.sql: DELETE FROM permissions WHERE name IN ('quantification_metric_export', 'quantification_metric_import');
